description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests Runner that runs on push to main, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: linux-test and windows-test. The linux-test job should run on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.11, checking out submodules, setting up Python, installing dependencies, building, and testing with pytest. The windows-test job should run on windows-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.11, setting up MSVC, checking out submodules, setting up Python, installing build dependencies, building a wheel, and testing with pytest.
